body_txt: A character — usually a woman, often The Vamp — wears lipstick with some sort of drug or poison in it, with the result that anyone who kisses her is affected by it. As for why the wearer herself isn't harmed, it may be explained that she is either naturally immune or took the antidote beforehand. Compare Mouth-to-Mouth Force-Feeding , Kiss of Death , Post-Kiss Catatonia , Clean Food, Poisoned Fork .
